canonical_definition: A human-verified benchmark built from fables and short stories from historical literature, designed to assess abstract moral reasoning in LLMs through a multiple-choice question answering task.
papers: Randomly Removing 50% of Dimensions in Text Embeddings has Minimal Impact on Retrieval and Classification Tasks

relationships.evidence: Paper title: Morables: A Benchmark for Assessing Abstract Moral Reasoning in LLMs with Fables
